title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-12
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, watering the apps and updating the community metrics.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status in the repository.
gist.impact: Keeps the app directory and greenhouse documentation up-to-date with the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: A cute pixel robot (representing the automated bot) watering plants (representing the apps and greenhouse) alongside Polly the bee holding a clipboard for metrics.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering a row of glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard, checking off metrics. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
